TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = Tamalon = Gaga mniq Yilan Tatungsyang ka alang Tamalon. 90 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 277 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 13% niqan 37 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 87% niqan 240 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Tayal11%, Amis1%, Rukai1%.
S.PHON: = tamalon = gaga mniq jilan tatuŋsjaŋ ka alaŋ tamalon. ** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, *** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan ** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji koia. kana ka kləəgan səəɟiq ga, tajal**%, amis*%, ɾukai*%.
S.FORM: = Tamalon = Gaga mniq Yilan Tatungsyang ka alang Tamalon. 90 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 277 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 13% niqan 37 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 87% niqan 240 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Tayal11%, Amis1%, Rukai1%.
S.PHON: = tamalon = gaga mniq jilan tatuŋsjaŋ ka alaŋ tamalon. ** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, *** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan ** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji koia. kana ka kləəgan səəɟiq ga, tajal**%, amis*%, ɾukai*%.
